3182530.name: Deep Menace VR
3182530.description:
Deep Menace VR is an immersive VR shooter focused on the satisfaction of killing horrific monsters in many different ways.

Deep Sea Creatures have left the ocean terrorizing cities, towns, and destroying everyone and everything in their path. The vast range of enemies will test your aim, courage and strategy. It’s up to you to face these terrifying creatures!

How will you face them, you ask? Don’t worry, you’ll have an amazing arsenal of weapons to choose, upgrade and combine as you prefer. Do you like fast shooting Rifles with no reloading? We got you covered. Powerful Shotguns that can turn your enemies into dust? Of course we have those! Or maybe you prefer a good old fashioned Sniper Rifle that can kill enemies before they take a single step towards you. How about special stuff like Rocket Launchers, Plasma Guns or Gatling Guns? Oh yes, we’ve got every weapon at your disposal!

Have fun from the first shot you take until your last on the 24th mission. There’s different difficulty levels to choose from so don’t worry if it’s easy or too hard, we’ve got the right amount of challenge for you.
3182530.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
